mapper.select: SELECT * FROM students WHERE is_deleted = false
SELECT id, student_id, course_name, course_start_at,course_end_at FROM students_courses
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students ( id, name, kana_name, nickname, email, living_area, age, sex, remark, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{kanaName}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{livingArea}, #{age}, #{sex}, #{remark}, false )
INSERT INTO students_courses ( course_name, student_id, course_start_at ) VALUES ( #{courseName}, #{studentId}, #{courseStartAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET name = #{name}, kana_name = #{kanaName}, nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, living_area = #{livingArea}, age = #{age}, sex = #{sex}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE students SET is_deleted = #{isDeleted} WHERE id = #{id} and is_deleted = false
UPDATE students SET is_deleted = #{isDeleted} WHERE id = #{id} and is_deleted = true
